description: Non-diagnostic triage routing record. G5 STRUCTURAL: emergencyFlag + targetActor enum constrained to the clinical-adjudication actors (mitate/iyashi/kokoro). kizashi cannot close a clinical loop itself — it can only refer. Red-flag emergency routes immediately to 受診/救急, never 'wait for next scan'.

targetActor.description: G3/G5: routing target. mitate (diagnosis) / iyashi (clinical encounter) / kokoro (psychosocial — pain is multifactorial). kizashi never self-treats.

emergencyFlag.description: G5 REQUIRED: true → immediate 受診/救急 routing via shared emergency-keyword lexicon; bypasses normal cadence

consentToShareCid.description: G6: member consent to share the (encrypted) scan provenance with the target actor
